“Indeed, there has come to you from Allah a light ( ra
Muhammad $5) and a plain Book (this Qur’an). Wherewith Allah
guides all those who seek His Good Pleasure to ways of peace, and
He brings them out of darkness by His Will unto light and guides
them to a Straight Way (Islamic Monotheism).” (Al-Ma’idah, 15-16)
Opponents testified to the growth and continuity of Islam. Enemies acknowledged its vitality and eternity. Western thinkers
and philosophers testified to Islam such as Bernard Shaw, Elias Abu Shab
text_simplified: في هذه الرسالة، يوصي القاضي عبد الحميد الناصح بنصائح تربوية للمدرسين لمساعدة الطلاب على تحقيق نجاحهم الأكاديمي وتطوير شخصياتهم بشكل إيجابي.
title: وصايا تربوية للمعلمين: بناء النجاح الأكاديمي والشخصية
